name: VSGO DKL-20 Camera Lens & Sensor Cleaning Portable Kit
description: Every sensor cleaning swab is made in a Class 100 Clean-Room and sealed in a vacuum package. Every wet wipe is pre-moistened and individually packed.

features.Key Features :: Lens cleaning tool | Ideal for cleaning screen lenses and cameras, it can also be used to clean iPads, mobile phones, glasses, etc. | High-quality microfiber cloth, lint-free, laser-cut edges, reusable and durable | Effectively removes dirt on the lens without damaging the coating
features.What's in The Box :: Lens Cleaner / 30ml | Sensor Cleaner / 15ml | Microfiber Lens Cleaning Cloth / 15cm×15cm x 4 | APS-C Sensor Cleaning Swab x 6 | Mini Air Blower | Wet Wipes x 4 | Lens Cleaning Pen | Lens Tissue Pack | Portable Case
